expectations.evidence: generateReport is ~27 lines. All other functions (filterOrders, sortOrders, aggregateOrders, formatCsv, etc.) are under 10 lines each.
filterOrders, sortOrders, aggregateOrders, formatCsv, formatJson, formatText, appendChartData are all pure functions with no I/O.
Separate functions for fetch (fetchUser, fetchOrders), calculate (aggregateOrders), format (formatCsv/Json/Text), cache/email in orchestrator boundary.
12 args replaced with single `options: ReportOptions` object.
generateReport returns the report (query). Email sending is a conditional side effect at the boundary, separated from the pure computation.
No classes or inheritance. Pure function composition throughout: filter → sort → aggregate → format pipeline.
Clear interfaces: Order, User, ReportFormat, SortField, ReportOptions, ReportAggregates all explicitly typed.
db, cache, logger still imported at top: `import { db } from './db'; import { cache } from './cache'; import { logger } from './logger'`. Not injected.
